Title: Industrial Black Metal Drawer Slides - Pair of Cabinet Hardware
Description:
Elevate your furniture with this pair of heavy-duty, black metal drawer slides. Designed for modern and industrial aesthetics, these slides provide seamless functionality and a robust, masculine touch to any cabinet or drawer unit.

  • Material & Build: Crafted from durable metal, these slides are built to handle weight and provide smooth operation for years to come. The matte black finish gives a striking industrial look.
  • Perfect Use Cases: Ideal for bathroom vanities, kitchen cabinets, industrial desks, media consoles, or any custom furniture project requiring superior drawer movement.
  • Easy Installation: Includes mounting hardware (screws/screws shown) and is designed for straightforward installation into standard shelving or cabinetry.

    Whether you are renovating a kitchen or building a custom piece, these slides offer both form and function, ensuring your storage solutions look as good as they operate.
